doc: Pure-TS port of GMP mpn_sub_1: subtract a single-limb scalar x from the n-limb non-negative integer in s (little-endian), returning the n-limb difference and the borrow-out (0 or 1). Symmetric to mpn_add_1. Substrate-class -- raw bigint arrays, no core.ts import (runner exempts substrate via requireCoreImport=false). When s < x (treated as unsigned), the result is the two's-complement representation of (s - x) mod 2^(64*n) and borrow=1; otherwise borrow=0.
c_signature: mp_limb_t mpn_sub_1(mp_limb_t *rp, const mp_limb_t *sp, mp_size_t n, mp_limb_t x)
refs: GMP manual §8.3 (Low-level Functions): single-limb subtract with borrow-out.
